feedback.text: Hello, to date I was not aware of this feedback function. Beautiful that democracy in the EU is so open! I am the owner of many games. I would also like to play old games with friends. I also find digital fairness that buying a game is really the purchase of a game unless an expiry date is already fixed at the time of the purchase. Many games I own depend on companies such as Steam and large publishers not going to fly, or on the fact that the servers go offline from profiters. Please integrate the Stop Killing Games Initiative into the Digital Fairness Act! I want to continue playing nostalgically old games with friends!
